zh.lifeSummary: 當Anselme de Bromwich於1284年出生在英國瓦維其可爾卡素 布洛維其時，他的父親Robert de Bromwich29歲，母親Isabella of Bromwich29歲。他和Alice de Aston of Warwickshire至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1345年在英國瓦維其可爾阿斯頓 曼諾享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anselme de Bromwich于1284年出生在英国瓦維其可爾卡素 布洛維其时，他的父亲Robert de Bromwich29岁，母亲Isabella of Bromwich29岁。他和Alice de Aston of Warwickshire至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1345年在英国瓦維其可爾阿斯頓 曼諾享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bromwich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from West Bromwich (Staffs) or Castle and Little Bromwich (Warwicks).

variants.name: Bromage
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Worcestershire): habitational name from West Bromwich in Staffordshire, or Castle and Little Bromwich in Warwickshire, named in Old English with brōm ‘broom’ (the shrub) + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’. Compare Brumage .

variants.name: Brimage
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Brumage  . This name is comparatively rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Anselme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from ‘divinity’ + ‘helmet’. St Anselm of Piedmont was Archbishop of Canterbury in the late 11th and early 12th centuries. See Anselm .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Anselme de Bromwich was born in 1284, in Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, England, his father, Robert de Bromwich, was 29 and his mother, Isabella of Bromwich, was 29. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Alice de Aston of Warwickshire. He died in 1345, in Aston Manor, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anselme de Bromwich est né en 1284, à Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Bromwich, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Isabella of Bromwich, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Alice de Aston of Warwickshire. Il est décédé en 1345, à Aston Manor, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anselme de Bromwich 1284 in Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Bromwich 29 und seine Mutter Isabella of Bromwich 29. Er hatte mit Alice de Aston of Warwickshire mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1345 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Aston Manor, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anselme de Bromwich è nato il nel 1284 nel Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Bromwich, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Isabella of Bromwich, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Alice de Aston of Warwickshire. Morì nel 1345, nel Aston Manor, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anselme de Bromwichが1284年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアカストル ブロムウィチで生まれた時，父Robert de Bromwichは29歳，母Isabella of Bromwichは29歳であった。彼はAlice de Aston of Warwickshireとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1345年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストン マノーで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anselme de Bromwich(이)가 1284년 영국 워윅실르 카스틀 브롬위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Bromwich(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella of Bromwich(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Alice de Aston of Warwickshire(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1345년 영국 워윅실르 애스턴 먼어에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anselme de Bromwich nasceu em 1284, em Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Bromwich, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Isabella of Bromwich, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Alice de Aston of Warwickshire. Ele faleceu em 1345, em Aston Manor, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anselme de Bromwich родился в 1284 г. в местности кастл бромвич, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Bromwich было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella of Bromwich, 29. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Alice de Aston of Warwickshire. Он умер в 1345 г. в местности астон манор, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anselme de Bromwich nació en 1284, en Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Bromwich, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Isabella of Bromwich, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Alice de Aston of Warwickshire. Murió en 1345, en Aston Manor, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
